title: Endovier
summary: A brutal salt-mine prison camp used by Adarlan for forced labor.

evidence.note: Celaena’s imprisonment and survival in Endovier are established.

title: The King’s Champion
summary: A covert operative selected through a royal competition to carry out missions for the King of Adarlan.

evidence.note: Dorian explains the competition, service term, and promise of freedom.

title: The Glass Castle
summary: The royal seat in Rifthold, built partly from glass and rising above the city.

evidence.note: Celaena sees and recalls the castle while approaching Rifthold.

title: Lady Lillian Gordaina
summary: The alias assigned to Celaena during the Champion competition to conceal that Dorian’s contestant is Adarlan’s Assassin.

evidence.note: She is introduced to the other competitors under the false name.

title: The Walking Dead
summary: An ancient book associated with Wyrdmarks and knowledge that ordinary court histories do not explain.

evidence.note: Celaena encounters the book and its unfamiliar marks.

title: Wyrdmarks
summary: Ancient symbols tied to a deeper form of power. At this point in the story, their complete rules and origins remain deliberately unclear.

evidence.note: The marks become identifiable as part of the mystery surrounding The Walking Dead.
